_note: Curated 'dream workshop leads' board for ZABAL Gamez, rendered at /dream-leads. Team-maintained: community nominations arrive via the Formspree form on the page (form_source=zabal-games-dream-lead-nomination) and get reviewed before being added here. Each lead needs a stable unique `id` (lowercase a-z0-9-_) - it is the upvote key in /api/dream-vote, so do not change an id once it has votes. Handles are bare (no @, no URL): farcaster, github, x. Empty handle fields are omitted in the UI. Voting is verified via the Farcaster Mini App (one +1 per FID per lead).

_schema.name: string
_schema.why: one line: what we'd love them to teach

leads.name: realproject7
leads.why: An open-source builder the community wants to see lead a session.
